understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) by moving horizontally and falling with gravity, while using clicks to clear breakable blocks that block the downward path.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Only MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT are allowed; after each move, gravity pulls the player down until they land on a solid tile. CLICK removes breakable tiles at a target position, which can open passages. Gravity is down (toward smaller y). Landing on spikes (u, v) ends the run. UNDO reverses the last action. The player has a limited number of moves per attempt and multiple attempts per level.
